mapper.select: SELECT t.*, y.xingming as xingming, CASE t.tongzhileixing WHEN 1 THEN '预约成功通知' WHEN 2 THEN '就诊前24小时提醒' WHEN 3 THEN '就诊前1小时提醒' WHEN 4 THEN '就诊当天提醒' ELSE '未知类型' END as tongzhileixingName, CASE t.fasongzhuangtai WHEN 0 THEN '待发送' WHEN 1 THEN '发送成功' WHEN 2 THEN '发送失败' ELSE '未知状态' END as fasongzhuangtaiName FROM tongzhijilu t LEFT JOIN yonghu y ON t.zhanghao = y.zhanghao 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT t.*, y.xingming as xingming, CASE t.tongzhileixing WHEN 1 THEN '预约成功通知' WHEN 2 THEN '就诊前24小时提醒' WHEN 3 THEN '就诊前1小时提醒' WHEN 4 THEN '就诊当天提醒' ELSE '未知类型' END as tongzhileixingName, CASE t.fasongzhuangtai WHEN 0 THEN '待发送' WHEN 1 THEN '发送成功' WHEN 2 THEN '发送失败' ELSE '未知状态' END as fasongzhuangtaiName FROM tongzhijilu t LEFT JOIN yonghu y ON t.zhanghao = y.zhanghao 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT t.*, y.xingming as xingming, CASE t.tongzhileixing WHEN 1 THEN '预约成功通知' WHEN 2 THEN '就诊前24小时提醒' WHEN 3 THEN '就诊前1小时提醒' WHEN 4 THEN '就诊当天提醒' ELSE '未知类型' END as tongzhileixingName, CASE t.fasongzhuangtai WHEN 0 THEN '待发送' WHEN 1 THEN '发送成功' WHEN 2 THEN '发送失败' ELSE '未知状态' END as fasongzhuangtaiName FROM tongzhijilu t LEFT JOIN yonghu y ON t.zhanghao = y.zhanghao 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment}
SELECT * FROM tongzhijilu WHERE fasongzhuangtai = 2 AND chongshicishu < #{maxRetryCount} ORDER BY addtime ASC
